team.name: Vineetha Medisetti
team.bio: With over a decade of dedicated experience, Vineetha has built VGS Global into a premier consultancy, helping students bridge the gap between their potential and world-class universities.

team.name: Strategic Co-Founder
team.bio: Focusing on operational excellence and ensuring that every student's application journey is seamless, compliant, and successful.

team.name: Strategy Co-Founder
team.bio: Managing global university partnerships and identifying scholarship opportunities for high-achieving students.
